## Verification

- [ ] `npm run test:all` passes
- [ ] Empty, normal, and large archives remain valid
- [ ] Desktop, tablet, and 320–390px mobile layouts were checked
- [ ] Keyboard and visible-focus behavior were checked
- [ ] Light, dark, reduced-motion, and forced-colors behavior was considered
- [ ] English UI and at least one non-English or RTL content case were considered
- [ ] Fixtures and screenshots contain no secrets or real private journal content
- [ ] README, AGENTS.md, and docs were updated for changed behavior
